title: Implement Taskboard board and card parity slice
goal: Ship a bounded Taskboard board or card SwiftUI slice that moves the product closer to credible Trello-like parity.

steps.text: Review the active parity gate, feature scope, acceptance criteria, and declared write scope.
Implement only the selected Taskboard board/card slice inside the declared files.
Run required verification for the touched behavior and record residual rough edges.
Write a short handoff summary listing changed interactions, risks, and next-best follow-up.
Pause for Samwise or squad-lead review before any commit-ready package or scope expansion.

acceptanceCriteria: Changes stay inside the declared Taskboard board/card write scope
Verification notes exist for the touched UI behavior
Residual rough edges are explicit instead of implied
Handoff summary is concrete and reviewable

verification.text: Confirm changed files match declared write scope
Confirm handoff summary includes changed interactions and residual risks
